repos.name: climate-dashboard
repos.description: Interactive global temperature dashboard using ERA5 data with ML-powered projections

repos.name: land_ocean_ensembles
repos.description: 10,000-member annual ensembles of global land (LSAT) and ocean (SST) temperature, 1850-2025, built from 5 LSAT + 4 SST products via a Thorne et al. (2026) style family-tree weighting.

repos.name: saf-vs-cdr-explorer
repos.description: Interactive explorer: sustainable aviation fuel vs carbon removal — cost per tonne of CO2 across 14 biomass pathways, with adjustable assumptions

repos.name: bicrs-map-uk
repos.description: UK BiCRS Atlas — interactive feedstock, CO2 storage & best-use-of-biomass map for the United Kingdom (UK subset of Frontier's BiCRS Atlas)

repos.name: biomass_map
repos.description: Interactive BiCRS/BECCS feedstock, CO2 storage & best-use-of-biomass map (Frontier strategy tool)

repos.name: gas_ccs_map
repos.description: Interactive map of US natural-gas power plants with least-cost CO2 transport & geologic storage costs (CCS siting screening tool)
